name: encourage-loop
description: Gentle guardrails for long-running coding agents: plan cursor, evidence gates, handoff notes, and drift nudges.

interface.shortDescription: Keep long-running Codex work aligned with a plan.
interface.longDescription: EncourageLoop helps Codex continue long-running work without drifting, skipping validation, falsely claiming completion, or losing state across sessions.
defaultPrompt: $encourage-loop Continue the current plan from .encourage/cursor.md. Do the next atomic task only, validate, checkpoint, and report evidence.
